raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Governor’s budget proposal includes the restoration of the business tax credits, including the R&D tax credit which spurs innovation and creates jobs.",
    "The $30 million hazard response modernization proposal supports the Fire Integrated Real-time Intelligence System (FIRIS) program, which increases real-time information and situational awareness during hazards events.",
    "FIRIS utilizes a combination of aircraft, high-definition real-time video, and data analysis to provide nearly instantaneous visual situation awareness for emergency management.",
    "Early detection and rapid intelligence from FIRIS allow for the strategic allocation of resources to reduce loss of life and property during disaster incidents.",
    "Investing in the Small Business Technical Assistance Program (SB-TAEP) gives small businesses the services they need to adapt to economic changes due to the pandemic.",
    "The budget includes substantial investments in zero-emission vehicles to support California's clean energy future.",
    "Allocating funds towards coastal protection, wildfire prevention, and the circular economy plays a crucial role in combating the climate crisis."
  ]
}
```
